Get your API key from your [Emailit Work: Get your API key from your [Emailit Workspace Settings](https://app.emailit.com/settings/api-keys).
Send an email to one or more recipients: Send an email to one or more recipients via Emailit.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Subject: Subject
Recipient email addresses. Up to 50 tota: Recipient email addresses. Up to 50 total across To, CC, and BCC.
Name recipients will see in their inbox,: Name recipients will see in their inbox, e.g. "Acme Support". If left blank, only the email address is shown.
Email address to send from. Must be veri: Email address to send from. Must be verified in your Emailit account.
Send a visible copy to these addresses.
Send a hidden copy to these addresses. O: Send a hidden copy to these addresses. Other recipients won't see them.
Where replies go. Defaults to the sender: Where replies go. Defaults to the sender email if left blank.
The subject line shown in the recipient': The subject line shown in the recipient's inbox.
The message body. Use Plain Text for sim: The message body. Use Plain Text for simple messages or HTML for rich formatting.
Add custom email headers as key-value pa: Add custom email headers as key-value pairs, e.g. X-Campaign-ID: welcome.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
